description: Resolves an entity's AABB against solid tilemap cells (a tile whose properties flag solid:true): stops at walls/ceilings, lands on floors, and writes the typed entity.contacts (onGround/onCeiling/onWallL/onWallR). A cell flagged oneWay:true is a one-way (pass-through) platform — solid on its top face only: a body lands on it from above but jumps up through it, runs past it sideways, and drops through it during move-platformer's drop-through window. 1.1.0: a cell whose props carry slopeL/slopeR (surface heights up from the cell bottom) is a floor SLOPE — resolved by a second non-AABB pass (resolveSlopes) that rests the body's bottom on the per-column surface so an entity walks up/down a ramp. Order it AFTER the velocity integrator. The terrain half of platformer collision.

solidProp.description: Tile-property flag marking a fully solid cell (default "solid").

oneWayProp.description: Tile-property flag marking a one-way (top-only) platform cell (default "oneWay").
